chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 574 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6905/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6906/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6907/2025 (R/Surety) 03.12.2025 Applicant / surety Qalandar Bux, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Mir Muhammad alias Meero Shaikh was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 24.08.2023, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate of such amount. Thereafter, bail application of the accused was dismissed and interim pre-arrest bail already granted to him was recalled by this Court vide order dated 20.11.2023. However, the accused has been acquitted in absentia by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 15.04.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
